2603.17507.title: QuantFL: Sustainable Federated Learning for Edge IoT via Pre-Trained Model Quantisation
2603.17507.paper_summary: Federated Learning (FL) enables privacy-preserving intelligence on Internet of Things (IoT) devices but incurs a significant carbon footprint due to the high energy cost of frequent uplink transmission. While pre-trained models are increasingly available on edge devices, their potential to reduce the energy overhead of fine-tuning remains underexplored. In this work, we propose QuantFL, a sustainable FL framework that leverages pre-trained initialisation to enable aggressive, computationally lightweight quantisation. We demonstrate that pre-training naturally concentrates update statistics, allowing us to use memory-efficient bucket quantisation without the energy-intensive overhead of complex error-feedback mechanisms. On MNIST and CIFAR-100, QuantFL reduces total communication by 40\% ($\simeq40\%$ total-bit reduction with full-precision downlink; $\geq80\%$ on uplink or when downlink is quantised) while matching or exceeding uncompressed baselines under strict bandwidth budgets; BU attains 89.00\% (MNIST) and 66.89\% (CIFAR-100) test accuracy with orders of magnitude fewer bits. We also account for uplink and downlink costs and provide ablations on quantisation levels and initialisation. QuantFL delivers a practical, "green" recipe for scalable training on battery-constrained IoT networks.
2603.17507.paper_summary_zh: 聯邦學習（FL）在物聯網（IoT）設備上實現了保護隱私的智能，但由於頻繁上行傳輸的高能耗，造成了顯著的碳足跡。儘管邊緣設備上越來越多可用的預訓練模型，但它們在減少微調的能源開銷方面的潛力仍未被充分探索。在這項工作中，我們提出了QuantFL，一個可持續的FL框架，利用預訓練初始化來實現激進的、計算輕量的量化。我們展示了預訓練自然集中更新統計，使我們能夠使用內存高效的桶量化，而無需複雜的錯誤反饋機制所需的高能耗開銷。在MNIST和CIFAR-100上，QuantFL將總通信量減少了40\%（$\simeq40\%$的全精度下行位元減少；上行或下行量化時則$\geq80\%$），同時在嚴格的帶寬預算下達到或超過未壓縮基準；BU在僅使用數量級更少的位元的情況下，實現了89.00\%（MNIST）和66.89\%（CIFAR-100）的測試準確率。我們還考慮了上行和下行的成本，並提供了對量化水平和初始化的消融實驗。QuantFL為在電池受限的IoT網絡上可擴展訓練提供了一個實用的“綠色”方案。
2603.17507.author: Charuka Herath et.al.
2603.17507.authors: Charuka Herath, Yogachandran Rahulamathavan, Varuna De Silva, Sangarapillai Lambotharan
